project_area: Community vitality, children and families support, education enrichment, homelessness, food insecurity, workforce development, childcare access, healthcare access, affordable housing
demographic_requirements: Underserved children and families, low-income families
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations in Massachusetts (primarily outside Greater Boston) that provide comprehensive services to enhance community vitality, support children and families, and address education, self-sufficiency, workforce development, homelessness, food insecurity, childcare access, healthcare access, or affordable housing.
